items.title: Scientists may have finally found how Alzheimer's spreads through the brain
items.summary: A common brain protein may be giving Alzheimer’s disease an unexpected way to spread, carrying toxic Tau proteins from damaged neurons into healthy ones. items.title: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
items.summary: Creatine is best known as a muscle-building supplement, but scientists are now investigating whether it could also help treat depression by boosting the brain's energy supply.
